pageContext.name: Kento Nanami
pageContext.description: From the TV anime, JUJUTSU KAISEN, Kotobukiya is proud to present Kento Nanami!  Created in highly detailed 1:8 scale form, Kento comes to life in an intense standstill, fixing his gaze upon his enemy. Extra attention was paid to sculpting his suit to fit beautifully over his well-built frame and relaxed pose. The details on his blunt sword and glasses have also been faithfully recreated.  The design of the base uses the character's signature colors to recreate the dark yet stylish feel of the anime!  Fans of Jujutsu Kaisen, be sure to add the jujutsu sorcerer Kento to your collection today!
